tactic_proof:
plusZeroRightNeutral Z = Refl
plusZeroRightNeutral (S k) = cong S (plusZeroRightNeutral k)
goal: plusZeroRightNeutral : (n : Nat) -> n + 0 = n

tactic_proof:
plusSuccRightSucc Z right = Refl
plusSuccRightSucc (S k) right = cong S (plusSuccRightSucc k right)
goal: plusSuccRightSucc : (left : Nat) -> (right : Nat) -> S (left + right) = left + S right

tactic_proof:
plusCommutative Z right = sym (plusZeroRightNeutral right)
plusCommutative (S k) right = rewrite plusCommutative k right in plusSuccRightSucc right k
goal: plusCommutative : (left : Nat) -> (right : Nat) -> left + right = right + left

tactic_proof:
plusAssociative Z c r = Refl
plusAssociative (S k) c r = cong S (plusAssociative k c r)
goal: plusAssociative : (l, c, r : Nat) -> l + (c + r) = (l + c) + r

tactic_proof:
multZeroRightZero Z = Refl
multZeroRightZero (S k) = multZeroRightZero k
goal: multZeroRightZero : (n : Nat) -> n * 0 = 0

tactic_proof:
multOneRightNeutral Z = Refl
multOneRightNeutral (S k) = cong S (multOneRightNeutral k)
goal: multOneRightNeutral : (n : Nat) -> n * 1 = n

tactic_proof:
multRightSuccPlus Z right = Refl
multRightSuccPlus (S k) right = rewrite multRightSuccPlus k right in rewrite sym (plusAssociative right k (k * right)) in rewrite plusCommutative right k in rewrite plusAssociative k right (k * right) in Refl
goal: multRightSuccPlus : (left, right : Nat) -> left * S right = left + left * right

tactic_proof:
multCommutative Z right = sym (multZeroRightZero right)
multCommutative (S k) right = rewrite multCommutative k right in sym (multRightSuccPlus right k)
goal: multCommutative : (left, right : Nat) -> left * right = right * left

tactic_proof:
multDistributesOverPlusLeft Z c r = Refl
multDistributesOverPlusLeft (S k) c r = rewrite multDistributesOverPlusLeft k c r in sym (plusAssociative r (k * r) (c * r))
goal: multDistributesOverPlusLeft : (l, c, r : Nat) -> (l + c) * r = l * r + c * r

tactic_proof:
multAssociative Z c r = Refl
multAssociative (S k) c r = rewrite multAssociative k c r in rewrite multDistributesOverPlusLeft c (k * c) r in Refl
goal: multAssociative : (l, c, r : Nat) -> l * (c * r) = (l * c) * r

tactic_proof:
decEqNat Z Z = Yes Refl
decEqNat Z (S _) = No absurd
decEqNat (S _) Z = No absurd
decEqNat (S k) (S j) = case decEqNat k j of { Yes prf => Yes (cong S prf); No contra => No (\h => contra (injective h)) }
goal: decEqNat : (n1, n2 : Nat) -> Dec (n1 = n2)

tactic_proof:
decEqBool True True = Yes Refl
decEqBool False False = Yes Refl
decEqBool True False = No absurd
decEqBool False True = No absurd
goal: decEqBool : (b1, b2 : Bool) -> Dec (b1 = b2)

tactic_proof: notNotTrue f x = f (\y => absurd (y x))
goal: notNotTrue : Not (Not a) -> a -> Void -> Void

tactic_proof:
decNot (Yes prf) = No (\f => f prf)
decNot (No contra) = Yes contra
goal: decNot : Dec a -> Dec (Not a)

tactic_proof:
vectAppendNilRightNeutral [] = Refl
vectAppendNilRightNeutral (x :: xs) = cong (x ::) (vectAppendNilRightNeutral xs)
goal: vectAppendNilRightNeutral : (xs : Vect n a) -> xs ++ [] = xs

tactic_proof:
vectMapId [] = Refl
vectMapId (x :: xs) = cong (x ::) (vectMapId xs)
goal: vectMapId : (xs : Vect n a) -> map id xs = xs

tactic_proof:
vectMapCompose f g [] = Refl
vectMapCompose f g (x :: xs) = cong (f (g x) ::) (vectMapCompose f g xs)
goal: vectMapCompose : (f : b -> c) -> (g : a -> b) -> (xs : Vect n a) -> map f (map g xs) = map (f . g) xs

tactic_proof:
vectLengthMap f [] = Refl
vectLengthMap f (x :: xs) = cong S (vectLengthMap f xs)
goal: vectLengthMap : (f : a -> b) -> (xs : Vect n a) -> length (map f xs) = length xs
vectReverseReverse : (xs : Vect n a) -> reverse (reverse xs) = xs

tactic_proof:
vectIndexMap f (x :: xs) FZ = Refl
vectIndexMap f (x :: xs) (FS k) = vectIndexMap f xs k
goal: vectIndexMap : (f : a -> b) -> (xs : Vect n a) -> (i : Fin n) -> index i (map f xs) = f (index i xs)

tactic_proof:
vectZipWithComm f prf [] [] = Refl
vectZipWithComm f prf (x :: xs) (y :: ys) = rewrite prf x y in cong (f y x ::) (vectZipWithComm f prf xs ys)
goal: vectZipWithComm : (f : a -> a -> b) -> ((x, y : a) -> f x y = f y x) -> (xs, ys : Vect n a) -> zipWith f xs ys = zipWith f ys xs

tactic_proof:
vectAppendLength [] ys = Refl
vectAppendLength (x :: xs) ys = cong S (vectAppendLength xs ys)
goal: vectAppendLength : (xs : Vect m a) -> (ys : Vect n a) -> length (xs ++ ys) = m + n

tactic_proof:
appendNilRightNeutral [] = Refl
appendNilRightNeutral (x :: xs) = cong (x ::) (appendNilRightNeutral xs)
goal: appendNilRightNeutral : (l : List a) -> l ++ [] = l

tactic_proof:
appendAssociative [] c r = Refl
appendAssociative (x :: xs) c r = cong (x ::) (appendAssociative xs c r)
goal: appendAssociative : (l, c, r : List a) -> l ++ (c ++ r) = (l ++ c) ++ r

tactic_proof:
mapAppend f [] l2 = Refl
mapAppend f (x :: xs) l2 = cong (f x ::) (mapAppend f xs l2)
goal: mapAppend : (f : a -> b) -> (l1, l2 : List a) -> map f (l1 ++ l2) = map f l1 ++ map f l2

tactic_proof:
lengthAppend [] l2 = Refl
lengthAppend (x :: xs) l2 = cong S (lengthAppend xs l2)
goal: lengthAppend : (l1, l2 : List a) -> length (l1 ++ l2) = length l1 + length l2

tactic_proof:
mapId [] = Refl
mapId (x :: xs) = cong (x ::) (mapId xs)
goal: mapId : (l : List a) -> map id l = l

tactic_proof:
mapCompose f g [] = Refl
mapCompose f g (x :: xs) = cong (f (g x) ::) (mapCompose f g xs)
goal: mapCompose : (f : b -> c) -> (g : a -> b) -> (l : List a) -> map f (map g l) = map (f . g) l

tactic_proof:
filterAppend p [] l2 = Refl
filterAppend p (x :: xs) l2 with (p x) | filterAppend p xs l2
  _ | True  | rec = cong (x ::) rec
  _ | False | rec = rec
goal: filterAppend : (p : a -> Bool) -> (l1, l2 : List a) -> filter p (l1 ++ l2) = filter p l1 ++ filter p l2
reverseAppend : (l1, l2 : List a) -> reverse (l1 ++ l2) = reverse l2 ++ reverse l1

tactic_proof:
finToNatBound FZ = LTESucc LTEZero
finToNatBound (FS k) = LTESucc (finToNatBound k)
goal: finToNatBound : (i : Fin n) -> LT (finToNat i) n

tactic_proof:
finToNatWeaken FZ = Refl
finToNatWeaken (FS k) = cong S (finToNatWeaken k)
goal: finToNatWeaken : (i : Fin n) -> finToNat (weaken i) = finToNat i

tactic_proof:
finToNatLast {n = Z} = Refl
finToNatLast {n = S k} = cong S finToNatLast
goal: finToNatLast : {n : Nat} -> finToNat (last {n}) = n
strengthenWeaken : (i : Fin n) -> strengthen (weaken i) = Just i
lastIsLargest : (i : Fin (S n)) -> LTE (finToNat i) n

tactic_proof: linearSwap x y = (y, x)
goal: linearSwap : (1 x : a) -> (1 y : b) -> (b, a)

tactic_proof: linearDup x = dup x
goal: linearDup : (1 x : a) -> {auto prf : Dup a} -> (a, a)

tactic_proof:
linearMap f [] = []
linearMap f (x :: xs) = f x :: linearMap f xs
goal: linearMap : (1 f : a -o b) -> (1 xs : LList a) -> LList b

tactic_proof: useOnce r = release r
goal: useOnce : (1 r : Resource) -> IO ()

tactic_proof:
linearFold f init [] = init
linearFold f init (x :: xs) = linearFold f (f init x) xs
goal: linearFold : (1 f : b -o a -o b) -> (1 init : b) -> (1 xs : LList a) -> b

tactic_proof: dpairFst (x ** _) = x
goal: dpairFst : DPair a p -> a

tactic_proof: dpairSnd (_ ** prf) = prf
goal: dpairSnd : (d : DPair a p) -> p (fst d)

tactic_proof:
filterDPair p [] = []
filterDPair p (x :: xs) with (p x) proof eq
  _ | True = (x ** eqToSo eq) :: filterDPair p xs
  _ | False = filterDPair p xs
goal: filterDPair : (p : a -> Bool) -> List a -> List (DPair a (\x => So (p x)))
lookupDPair : DecEq k => (key : k) -> List (k, v) -> Maybe (DPair v (\_ => Unit))

tactic_proof: existsNat = (5 ** reflexive)
goal: existsNat : (n : Nat ** LTE 5 n)
functorId : Functor f => (x : f a) -> map id x = x
functorCompose : Functor f => (g : b -> c) -> (h : a -> b) -> (x : f a) -> map g (map h x) = map (g . h) x
monadLeftId : Monad m => (a : t) -> (f : t -> m u) -> (pure a >>= f) = f a
monadRightId : Monad m => (ma : m a) -> (ma >>= pure) = ma
monadAssoc : Monad m => (ma : m a) -> (f : a -> m b) -> (g : b -> m c) -> ((ma >>= f) >>= g) = (ma >>= (\x => f x >>= g))
